data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether a failed item triggers a work order or equipment lockout. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a forklift fails inspection and is locked out, it does not provide concrete evidence of the system's behavior in response to a failed item beyond this specific instance. There is no evidence of the underlying mechanisms or endpoints that confirm the requirement is consistently met across different scenarios or equipment types, indicating a gap in the validation.
gaps: No evidence of consistent triggering of work orders or equipment lockouts for failed items across various equipment types.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define API behavior for failed inspections
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that a failed inspection consistently triggers a work order and equipment lockout.
